//: Authored beta release notes. Edit this when cutting a new beta, then run the Release workflow (channel: prerelease). scripts/gen-manifest.mjs bakes this into download.popbot.app/manifest.json, and the website renders it as the beta band. `icon` is a full Font Awesome 6 class incl. style prefix (e.g. 'fa-solid fa-clone' or 'fa-brands fa-jira').
headline: The biggest PopBot update yet — now in beta

highlights.title: Unlimited copies of your repo
highlights.body: Open new chats in unlimited live copies of your full repo + asset library — up to 1 TB — all using the disk space of a single repo, thanks to copy-on-write workspace folders.

highlights.title: Perforce & Helix Swarm reviews
highlights.body: First-class Perforce alongside Git, with full Helix Swarm code-review integration — pin changelists into your Reviews inbox and review each in its own agent chat.

highlights.title: Full Jira support
highlights.body: Turn Jira issues into one-click agent sessions and drive them through your workflow — right alongside Linear and GitHub.

highlights.title: Unreal Engine — plus Unity
highlights.body: Full Unreal Engine integration: launch the editor from any chat so agents can run and test your game. Unity and custom engines stay fully supported.

highlights.title: GitHub Issues
highlights.body: GitHub Issues join your inbox alongside pull requests — triage and fix them in a chat without leaving PopBot.

highlights.title: Speaks your language
highlights.body: PopBot's entire interface — menus, settings, and more — is fully localized. Switch languages any time from the menu.
